name: George Harrison
description: English musician and member of the Beatles (1943–2001)
abstract: George Harrison (25 February 1943 – 29 November 2001) was an English musician who achieved international fame as the lead guitarist of the Beatles. Known as "the quiet Beatle", Harrison played a significant role in shaping the band's musical direction and established a successful solo career, particularly through his interest in Eastern …

works.t: I Want to Hold Your Hand
I Want to Hold Your Hand

about_quotes.evidence: Bangledesh you know with George Harrison, my goodness you know, how fantastic that was, and the tour we did.

about_quotes.speaker: John Altman
about_quotes.evidence: And years later I found out that George Harrison, who produced the film, insisted that my arrangement be restored into the film.
